title: Debt capacity and refinancing
purpose: Assess debt service, leverage, liquidity and refinancing constraints under explicit terms.
business_questions: Can projected cash flows service the proposed debt terms?
How do refinancing terms affect leverage and covenant headroom?
does_not_answer: Will a lender approve the facility?
What legal terms should the borrower accept?
inappropriate_uses: Analysis without debt terms or operating cash-flow evidence
common_misunderstandings: Modelled capacity is not lender approval.
Passing a modelled covenant does not establish compliance with legal documents.
limitations: Does not constitute a lending decision.
